events.title: Tyler Miller, Gio Genesis, Saint Luke at The Bandshell
events.description:
Click here for tickets! https://wl.eventim.us/event/tyler-miller-gio-genesis-saint-luke/698010?afflky=Getitrightthefirsttime
Industry City and Get It Right Music in association with Murmrr Presents are thrilled to present Tyler Miller, Gio Genesis, and Saint Luke at Industry City Bandshell playing three sets under the stars in Brooklyn’s Sunset Park!
Event Info
Date: July 25, 2026
Doors: 4:00pm
Set 1: 4:30pm
Set 2: 5:15pm
Set 3: 6:15pm
Tickets: $15 per person plus fees in advance/$20 per person day of show
16+
Address: Industry City Bandshell Stage, Courtyard 1/2 at Industry City in Brooklyn New York between 36th and 37th street and 2nd and 3rd Avenues.
ENTER 238 36th Street, Brooklyn, NY on your GPS device
The venue is located in an open-air courtyard featuring a full concert sound stage. Fans can get affordable drinks from the venue’s bar and order food from over 17 options inside the adjoining food hall. Concert is rain or shine.
How to get here:
Take the D, N, R lines to 36th street station in Brooklyn and walk west one block to Industry City. 3 stops from Manhattan. 30 minutes from Herald Square.
From Long Island, take the LIRR to Atlantic Terminal then take the D, N or R train to 36th street.
Saint Luke:
Saint Luke is an American singer-songwriter, multi-instrumentalist and producer from New York City. With influences in the world of R&B, jazz, folk and rock, Luke is a genre-bender through and through. His first two self-produced EP’s, “PURE LIGHT” and “warrior of solitude” demonstrated his range and production skills, exploring themes of heartbreak and acceptance. With the release of his upcoming debut album, Luke is exploring a different palette of sounds. Featuring more raw, acoustic instrumentation and more nuanced themes of change and grief, the production leaves room for the songwriting to shine.
Gio Genesis:
New York’s Gio Genesis is a story-driven R&B & Hip-Hop artist blending cinematic vocals with raw rap energy. In a genre he calls Gio-Pop, Genesis doesn’t seek to fit in anyone’s box, infusing elements of multiple sounds and timelines to create a perfect storm of enjoyability and relatability.
Tyler Miller:
Influenced by many eras of Pop, R&B, Hip Hop, and Rock music, the New York native singer/songwriter has crafted a signature sound that resonates with a wide range of listeners. Known for his cinematic visuals and passionate live performances, Tyler Miller has created a world that is unique, but familiar.
events.vendor: Tyler Miller, Gio Genesis, Saint Luke at The Bandshell

events.title: Industry City Gourmet Food and Drinks Tour
events.description:
Set against the iconic backdrop of Sunset Park’s historic waterfront, the massive, revitalized structures of Industry City form a breathtaking stage for an exclusive culinary journey. This premium food and cocktail tour is a curated exploration of taste and craft, transforming an evening into a memorable, high-end experience.
Your adventure begins with artistic bonbons at Lilac Chocolates, explores gourmet imports at Sahadi’s, and includes a refined whiskey tasting at Fort Hamilton Distillery, followed by a sophisticated sake flight. Savor additional artisanal discoveries within the awe-inspiring industrial halls.
Perfect as a distinctive date night, this tour is also fully customizable for private groups and corporate retreats. We specialize in tailoring this engaging experience for team-building and client entertainment, making it an ideal one-day corporate outing. A sophisticated mini-vacation for locals and a profound discovery for visitors.
events.vendor: Industry City Gourmet Food and Drinks Tour

events.title: Brooklyn Robot Foundry Summer Circuits! Every Day
events.description:
Join us for Summer Circuits at Industry City!
254 36th Street, Building 2- Suite C249 ( Second Floor)
We’ll be building a different robot every day, all summer! The highlight of our summer programs is the daily robot-building, of course! And we’ll also be playing games, making crafts, enjoying free play, going outside, and more. Our experienced instructors are passionate about inspiring young minds, fostering creativity, championing kindness, and celebrating some goofiness throughout it all.
events.vendor: Brooklyn Robot Foundry Summer Circuits! Every Day

events.title: Diverse City Comedy Tour
events.description:
Detroit Reid is a rising comedian based out of Bessemer Alabama known for his raw storytelling, quick crowd work, and unfiltered takes on everyday life, relationships, work, and culture. Originally influenced by the humor and energy of Detroit, Reid brings a high-energy style to the stage that blends real-life experiences with sharp punchlines and relatable comedy. Follow @DetroitReidComedy

"SOUL" is an Actor/Comic and Military Retiree.
A veteran of Stage and Screen, he has over 20 background Acting Credits most notably on “The Ms. Pat” Show and Season 3 of "TIRES" on Netflix.
Follow him on-line @TheregoSOUL

Life Of Pablo is a Latino comedian, content creator, and actor known for turning everyday family life, marriage, fatherhood, and cultural experiences into relatable comedy that connects with audiences of all backgrounds.
With over 2.1 million followers on Facebook, generating 60+ million monthly views, and a combined audience of 3.1 million followers across Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok, Life Of Pablo continues to entertain millions through viral content, authentic storytelling, and stand-up comedy.
Whether on stage or online, Life Of Pablo delivers humor that is personal, relatable, and unforgettable.
Follow Life Of Pablo on Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.
events.vendor: Diverse City Comedy Tour
